title: XML Parser
scenario: Write a prompt to generate a Java code that recursively parses an XML file and prints the element tags and their corresponding text content. The code should use a recursive descent parser approach to traverse the XML tree. The generated code should include methods for parsing and printing the XML document.

evaluationCriteria.description: The code is written in correct Java syntax.
The code adheres to the provided constraints (Java syntax and recursive method definitions).
The code implements a correct recursive descent parser for XML parsing.
